title: bobua arisanensis
side_effects: Bobua arisanensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness, nausea, and headaches in some individuals due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap may also lead to skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can cause liver damage, respiratory problems, and even cardiac arrest in extreme cases. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the Bobua arisanensis plant for any health benefits.
